subject: NEW: tangofestivals.net — 99 global festivals ready
body:
Porter,

## New Source: tangofestivals.net

Scraped 99 festival/marathon/encuentro events from tangofestivals.net.

### Stats

| Metric | Count |
|--------|-------|
| Events | 99 |
| With coords | 96 (97%) |
| Categories | FESTIVAL, MARATHON, ENCUENTRO, WEEKEND, HOLIDAY, WORKSHOP |

### Sample Events

| Event | Location | Dates |
|-------|----------|-------|
| Barcelona Tango Marathon | Barcelona, Spain | Apr 2-6 |
| Beirut Tango Abrazo | Beirut, Lebanon | Feb 26 - Mar 1 |
| Tango Bliss Workshop Weekend | Northampton, US | Apr 17-19 |
| Zürich Tango Weekend | Zurich, Switzerland | Apr 24-26 |

### Data Location

```
harvester/sites/tangofestivals/data/tangofestivals.sqlite
```

### Schema

```sql
SELECT title, start_date, end_date, city, country, lat, lng, category
FROM events
WHERE start_date > date('now')
ORDER BY start_date;
```

### Notes

- Dates are ISO 8601 (no Z suffix from source, but they're date-only not datetime)
- All have lat/lng except 3 (venue not specified)
- FB URLs included where available
- Category mapped: FESTIVAL, MARATHON, ENCUENTRO, WEEKEND, WORKSHOP, HOLIDAY

Ready when you are.

— Harvey
